title: Melted Brown Sugar Spanish Sweet Potato Tacos
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly Spanish dish featuring roasted sweet potatoes, melted brown sugar, and sauteed onions, served in a traditional talavera plate.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the sweet potatoes with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt, and pepper, and roast for 20 minutes.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onions and minced garlic over medium heat until the onions are translucent.
Add the roasted sweet potatoes to the skillet and stir to combine with the onions and garlic.
In a small saucepan, melt the brown sugar over low heat, stirring constantly.
Brush the melted brown sugar over the sweet potato mixture and stir to combine.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the sweet potato mixture onto a tortilla and topping with shredded cheese, chopped cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Serve the tacos in a traditional talavera plate and enjoy.
